description: Edge case — every pillar uses 'other' with custom free-text. Tests that the pipeline tolerates arbitrary operator vocabulary.

mocked_enrichment.company_context: Vertical we don't have a category for — adjacent to construction tech but really a workforce-data platform. Hybrid usage + seat billing.

pillar_2.claude_plan_other_note: Self-hosted Claude API proxy with shared billing across three teams.

pillar_3.product_state_other: Private beta — 8 design partners, none paying yet but committed.

pillar_4.sales_motion_other: Consultative — 3-call close with a VP sponsor.

pillar_5.comm_channel_other: Signal (messenger) for urgent, email for digest.
pillar_5.urgency_routing_other: Any P0 alerts ping the founder's Signal; everything else weekly email.
